introSection: Mine Expressen is a steel roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Mine Expressen is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an engine.

fullText:
Mine Expressen is a steel roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark.

Mine Expressen is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

Green track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine.
